id.description: kebab-case unique id; defaults to slug of name

role.description: What the feature is for. Omitted = combat. Roleplay features are for dialogue, exploration, and improvised attempts outside combat.

sheetSummary.description: REQUIRED EVENTUALLY on every feature (backfill before character creation ships). The condensed text shown on a player's character sheet: ONLY what it does — effect, damage + type, conditions applied, cost/uses. Cut all flavor and 'why/how' prose. Features with `options` keep their full options table on the sheet regardless (Wild Card and the like are pertinent info).

meta.description: At-a-glance combat fields shown as labelled chips below the feature (D&D Beyond style). All optional; author what applies. Every actionable feature should at least set `action`.

action.description: Action economy: Action / Bonus Action / Reaction / Free / Passive / Movement / Part of Attack / Special.

cost.description: Resource spent, e.g. '1 Mayhem', '1-3 Grit', '1 Clone'.

uses.description: Usage limit, e.g. '1 / turn', 'Cha mod / long rest', '1 / round'.

range.description: Range or area, e.g. '30 ft', 'Self', '5 ft', '10-ft radius'.

save.description: Save it forces, e.g. 'Dex save vs your DC'.

options.description: For a feature that offers a menu of choices or a random table (e.g. the Joker's Gambit or Wild Card). The renderer shows these as a table so the choices are scannable; `description` holds the intro text. Author any multi-option feature this way rather than cramming the options into prose.

roll.description: Optional die result for a random table (e.g. 1-8 for a d8). Omit for a pick-one menu.

effect.description: What it does. May contain [[XdY]] scaling-die tokens.

parryBaseDC.description: Circus-system Parry v2: this class's base Parry DC (lower = easier to parry / better parrier). Feeds the effective Parry DC formula (proficiency + half defense-ability modifier subtracted, situational modifiers added, floor of 3). See data/schema/MECHANICS.md §1.5-1.6. Roster spread is 7 (Acrobat, best) to 15 (Puppeteer, worst). Optional/omit for non-circus (e.g. 5e SRD) classes that don't use the rebuilt Parry reaction. REPLACES the removed v1 'parryAffinity' tier field — do not reintroduce parryAffinity.

defenseAbility.description: Ability score whose modifier feeds any Riposte/feature that makes an ATTACK ROLL, at full value (data/schema/MECHANICS.md §1.9-1.10). NOTE (v4): this NO LONGER affects the Parry DC — the DC is fixed and does not scale with ability (§1.5). Currently vestigial: none of the shipped Ripostes roll to hit, so the field has no active effect yet — it is reserved for future roll-to-hit content. CONVENTION: still set it to the class's own primaryAbility. Defaults to Dexterity if omitted.

parryReskin.description: Flavor text for how this class's Parry outcome narrates (e.g. 'a clone phases in to eat the hit'). See data/schema/MECHANICS.md §1.4.

riposte.description: Free text describing a Full-Dodge-only (d20 roll strictly above the effective Parry DC) counterattack effect, if this class has one. Null/omit if the class has no riposte. See data/schema/MECHANICS.md §1.9.

keyStats.description: Derived at-a-glance numbers for this class's own mechanic — its save/effect DC (e.g. 'Gambit DC', 'Control DC'), resource cap, base Parry DC, and any other headline value a player needs up front. The renderer shows these in a stat block at the top of the class sheet (like a Monk's Ki save DC / Martial Arts die). Author one entry per headline number; every class with a mechanic should have this so its numbers are visible without reading the feature prose.

label.description: Short name of the stat, e.g. 'Gambit DC', 'Momentum Cap', 'Parry Base DC'.

value.description: The at-a-glance display: a short typical progression a player can read instantly, e.g. '≈4 (L1) · 6 (L9+)'. Keep the raw formula out of here — put it in `formula` so it shows on hover instead. If there is no formula (a flat number like a Parry DC), this can just be that number.

formula.description: Optional exact calculation shown in a hover tooltip on the value (mirrors the [[XdY]] scaling-die tooltip), e.g. 'Constitution modifier + proficiency bonus (minimum 3)'. Use this for any value derived from ability modifiers or proficiency so the confusing math is available on demand but not cluttering the at-a-glance number.

note.description: Optional one-line explanation of what the stat governs.

engine.description: This class's own resource/engine (Momentum, Grit, Chaos deck, clone tokens, etc.) — its sole resource. See data/schema/MECHANICS.md.

name.description: In-fiction name of the resource, e.g. 'Momentum', 'Grit', 'Chaos Deck'.

resourceType.description: Shape of the resource for renderer/UI purposes.

description.description: What the resource represents and how it behaves in general.

spend.description: How the resource is spent and what it buys.

cap.description: Max resource value, as an at-a-glance typical progression (e.g. '≈4 (L1–4) · 5–6 (L5+)'). Keep the raw formula out of here — put it in `capFormula` so it shows on hover instead. A flat integer is fine for a non-scaling cap.

capFormula.description: Optional exact cap calculation shown in a hover/tap tooltip on the Cap value (mirrors keyStats.formula), e.g. 'Constitution modifier + proficiency bonus (minimum 3)'.
